trait.name: Rampart
trait.effect: You are an imposing sight on the battlefield. Whether through gear, training, or simple toughness, you gain the following benefits have 1 armor. Once a round, before you or an adjacent ally is targeted by a foe's ability, you may grant that character +1d3 armor against the entire ability. Foes must spend +1 movement to exit a space adjacent to you.

basicAttack.name: Furor
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
On hit 2 vigor. If you or your target is in crisis, deals damage [+] and double vigor gain.

keywords.name: Push X
keywords.description: Move a character X spaces away from you.

keywords.name: Stance
keywords.description: A powerful ongoing effect. You can only maintain one stance at a time. You may exit any stance voluntarily at the start of your turn.

keywords.name: Sturdy (+)
keywords.description: When you would be forcibly moved, ignore it.

keywords.name: Stun (-)
keywords.description: When taking a turn, deal half damage this turn.

keywords.name: Unstoppable
keywords.description: Can't be forcibly moved. Immune to the effects of all negative statuses. Movement cannot be reduced or stopped for any reason.
